title: En Las Garras De La Bestia
original_title: En Las Garras De La Bestia
overview: In Tijuana, Baja California, life becomes unbearable for a woman who is constantly harassed by a neighbor. Seeking peace and a fresh start, she decides to leave everything behind and cross into the United States in hopes of building a safer life. After finding work, she slowly begins to uncover a horrifying truth: the people she works for are involved in abducting young girls, murdering them, and trafficking their organs. Terrified but determined, she must find a way to gather evidence and alert the authorities without exposing herself to deadly danger. Caught in a web of fear and violence, her courage becomes the only weapon she has against a ruthless criminal network.
